chapter_description: 恭喜你完成了所有课程学习！现在是时候运用所学知识，完成最终项目，成为代码岛的守护者！

lessons.title: 项目规划
lessons.description: 学习如何规划一个Python项目的结构。
lessons.story: 作为岛屿守护者，你需要创建一个完整的冒险游戏项目。
lessons.starter_code:
# 项目结构示例
"""
adventure_game/
├── main.py          # 程序入口
├── player.py        # 玩家模块
├── enemy.py         # 敌人模块
├── items.py         # 物品模块
├── battle.py        # 战斗模块
└── utils.py         # 工具函数
"""

# main.py - 程序入口
print("=== 代码岛冒险游戏 ===")
print("项目结构设计完成！")
print("\n模块分工:")
print("- main.py: 游戏主循环")
print("- player.py: 玩家角色")
print("- enemy.py: 敌人系统")
print("- items.py: 物品背包")
print("- battle.py: 战斗系统")
print("- utils.py: 工具函数")
lessons.expected_output:
=== 代码岛冒险游戏 ===
项目结构设计完成！

模块分工:
- main.py: 游戏主循环
- player.py: 玩家角色
- enemy.py: 敌人系统
- items.py: 物品背包
- battle.py: 战斗系统
- utils.py: 工具函数
hints: 项目需要清晰的模块划分
每个文件负责一个功能

lessons.title: 玩家系统
lessons.description: 设计并实现完整的玩家类。
lessons.story: 创建功能完整的玩家角色系统。
lessons.starter_code:
# 玩家类
class Player:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.level = 1
        self.hp = 100
        self.max_hp = 100
        self.attack = 15
        self.defense = 5
        self.exp = 0
        self.gold = 0
        self.inventory = []
    
    def take_damage(self, damage):
        actual = max(0, damage - self.defense)
        self.hp -= actual
        return actual
    
    def heal(self, amount):
        self.hp = min(self.max_hp, self.hp + amount)
    
    def gain_exp(self, amount):
        self.exp += amount
        while self.exp >= 100:
            self.level_up()
    
    def level_up(self):
        self.level += 1
        self.exp -= 100
        self.max_hp += 20
        self.hp = self.max_hp
        self.attack += 3
        self.defense += 2
        print(f"🎉 {self.name} 升级到 Lv.{self.level}!")
    
    def add_item(self, item):
        self.inventory.append(item)
    
    def status(self):
        return f"{self.name} Lv.{self.level} HP:{self.hp}/{self.max_hp} ATK:{self.attack} DEF:{self.defense}"

# 测试玩家系统
hero = Player("旅行者")
print(hero.status())
hero.gain_exp(100)
print(hero.status())
hero.add_item("魔法剑")
print(f"背包: {hero.inventory}")
lessons.expected_output:
旅行者 Lv.1 HP:100/100 ATK:15 DEF:5
🎉 旅行者 升级到 Lv.2!
旅行者 Lv.2 HP:120/120 ATK:18 DEF:7
背包: ['魔法剑']
hints: 用类封装玩家所有数据

lessons.title: 战斗系统
lessons.story: 让玩家和敌人能够进行战斗！
lessons.starter_code:
# 战斗系统
import random

class Battle:
    def __init__(self, player, enemy):
        self.player = player
        self.enemy = enemy
        self.turn = 0
    
    def player_attack(self):
        damage = random.randint(self.player.attack - 3, self.player.attack + 3)
        actual = self.enemy.take_damage(damage)
        print(f"⚔️ {self.player.name} 攻击 {self.enemy.name}，造成 {actual} 伤害！")
        return not self.enemy.is_alive()
    
    def enemy_attack(self):
        damage = random.randint(self.enemy.attack - 2, self.enemy.attack + 2)
        actual = self.player.take_damage(damage)
        print(f"💥 {self.enemy.name} 攻击 {self.player.name}，造成 {actual} 伤害！")
        return not self.player.hp > 0
    
    def execute(self):
        print(f"\n⚔️ 战斗开始！{self.player.name} VS {self.enemy.name}")
        while self.player.hp > 0 and self.enemy.is_alive():
            self.turn += 1
            print(f"\n--- 第 {self.turn} 回合 ---")
            if self.player_attack():
                print(f"🏆 {self.player.name} 获胜！")
                self.player.gain_exp(self.enemy.exp_reward)
                self.player.gold += self.enemy.gold_reward
                return True
            if self.enemy_attack():
                print(f"💔 {self.player.name} 被击败...")
                return False
            print(f"{self.player.name} HP:{self.player.hp} | {self.enemy.name} HP:{self.enemy.hp}")
        return self.player.hp > 0

# 简化测试（使用上面的类）
print("战斗系统设计完成！")
print("功能包括：回合制战斗、伤害计算、胜负判定、奖励发放")
lessons.expected_output:
战斗系统设计完成！
功能包括：回合制战斗、伤害计算、胜负判定、奖励发放
hints: 回合制：玩家先攻，敌人反击
lessons.example_solution:
import random
class Battle:
    def __init__(self, player, enemy):
        self.player = player
        self.enemy = enemy
        self.turn = 0
    def player_attack(self):
        damage = random.randint(self.player.attack - 3, self.player.attack + 3)
        actual = self.enemy.take_damage(damage)
        print(f"⚔️ {self.player.name} 攻击 {self.enemy.name}，造成 {actual} 伤害！")
        return not self.enemy.is_alive()
    def enemy_attack(self):
        damage = random.randint(self.enemy.attack - 2, self.enemy.attack + 2)
        actual = self.player.take_damage(damage)
        print(f"💥 {self.enemy.name} 攻击 {self.player.name}，造成 {actual} 伤害！")
        return not self.player.hp > 0
    def execute(self):
        print(f"\n⚔️ 战斗开始！{self.player.name} VS {self.enemy.name}")
        while self.player.hp > 0 and self.enemy.is_alive():
            self.turn += 1
            print(f"\n--- 第 {self.turn} 回合 ---")
            if self.player_attack():
                print(f"🏆 {self.player.name} 获胜！")
                self.player.gain_exp(self.enemy.exp_reward)
                self.player.gold += self.enemy.gold_reward
                return True
            if self.enemy_attack():
                print(f"💔 {self.player.name} 被击败...")
                return False
        return self.player.hp > 0
print("战斗系统设计完成！")
print("功能包括：回合制战斗、伤害计算、胜负判定、奖励发放")

lessons.title: 存档系统
lessons.description: 实现游戏数据的保存和加载。
lessons.story: 让玩家可以保存游戏进度。
lessons.starter_code:
# 存档系统
import json

class SaveManager:
    @staticmethod
    def save(player, filename="save.json"):
        data = {
            "name": player.name,
            "level": player.level,
            "hp": player.hp,
            "max_hp": player.max_hp,
            "attack": player.attack,
            "defense": player.defense,
            "exp": player.exp,
            "gold": player.gold,
            "inventory": player.inventory
        }
        json_str = json.dumps(data, indent=2)
        print(f"💾 存档保存成功！")
        return json_str
    
    @staticmethod
    def load(json_str):
        data = json.loads(json_str)
        player = Player(data["name"])
        player.level = data["level"]
        player.hp = data["hp"]
        player.max_hp = data["max_hp"]
        player.attack = data["attack"]
        player.defense = data["defense"]
        player.exp = data["exp"]
        player.gold = data["gold"]
        player.inventory = data["inventory"]
        print(f"📂 存档加载成功！")
        return player

# 测试存档系统
hero = Player("旅行者")
hero.gain_exp(150)
hero.gold = 100
hero.inventory = ["魔法剑", "治疗药水"]

print("=== 保存前 ===")
print(hero.status())
print(f"金币: {hero.gold}")
print(f"背包: {hero.inventory}")

save_data = SaveManager.save(hero)
print("\n存档数据:")
print(save_data)
lessons.expected_output:
=== 保存前 ===
🎉 旅行者 升级到 Lv.2!
旅行者 Lv.2 HP:120/120 ATK:18 DEF:7
金币: 100
背包: ['魔法剑', '治疗药水']
💾 存档保存成功！

存档数据:

lessons.example_solution:
import json
class SaveManager:
    @staticmethod
    def save(player, filename="save.json"):
        data = {"name": player.name, "level": player.level, "hp": player.hp, "max_hp": player.max_hp, "attack": player.attack, "defense": player.defense, "exp": player.exp, "gold": player.gold, "inventory": player.inventory}
        json_str = json.dumps(data, indent=2)
        print(f"💾 存档保存成功！")
        return json_str
    @staticmethod
    def load(json_str):
        data = json.loads(json_str)
        player = Player(data["name"])
        player.level = data["level"]
        player.hp = data["hp"]
        player.max_hp = data["max_hp"]
        player.attack = data["attack"]
        player.defense = data["defense"]
        player.exp = data["exp"]
        player.gold = data["gold"]
        player.inventory = data["inventory"]
        print(f"📂 存档加载成功！")
        return player
hero = Player("旅行者")
hero.gain_exp(150)
hero.gold = 100
hero.inventory = ["魔法剑", "治疗药水"]
print("=== 保存前 ===")
print(hero.status())
print(f"金币: {hero.gold}")
print(f"背包: {hero.inventory}")
save_data = SaveManager.save(hero)
print("\n存档数据:")
print(save_data)

lessons.title: 游戏主循环
lessons.description: 把所有系统组合起来，创建完整的游戏循环。
lessons.starter_code:
# 简化的游戏主循环
def game_loop():
    print("=== 代码岛冒险 ===")
    print("1. 开始冒险")
    print("2. 查看状态")
    print("3. 退出游戏")
    
    while True:
        choice = input("\n选择操作 (1-3): ")
        
        if choice == "1":
            print("开始冒险...")
            # 这里可以加入战斗逻辑
        elif choice == "2":
            print("查看状态...")
            # 显示玩家状态
        elif choice == "3":
            print("感谢游玩！")
            break
        else:
            print("无效选择")

# 模拟输入测试
print("游戏主循环设计完成！")
print("\n包含功能:")
print("- 菜单显示")
print("- 用户输入处理")
print("- 无限循环直到退出")
print("- 错误处理")
lessons.expected_output:
游戏主循环设计完成！

包含功能:
- 菜单显示
- 用户输入处理
- 无限循环直到退出
- 错误处理
hints: while True 创建无限循环
lessons.example_solution:
def game_loop():
    print("=== 代码岛冒险 ===")
    print("1. 开始冒险")
    print("2. 查看状态")
    print("3. 退出游戏")
    while True:
        choice = input("\n选择操作 (1-3): ")
        if choice == "1":
            print("开始冒险...")
        elif choice == "2":
            print("查看状态...")
        elif choice == "3":
            print("感谢游玩！")
            break
        else:
            print("无效选择")
print("游戏主循环设计完成！")
print("\n包含功能:")
print("- 菜单显示")
print("- 用户输入处理")

print("- 错误处理")

lessons.title: 守护者试炼
lessons.description: 综合所有知识，完成最终的冒险游戏！
lessons.story: 现在，把所有模块组合起来，创建一个完整的文字冒险游戏！
lessons.starter_code:
# ========== 完整冒险游戏 ==========
# 组合所有模块

# --- 玩家类 ---
class Player:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.level = 1
        self.hp = 100
        self.max_hp = 100
        self.attack = 15
        self.defense = 5
        self.exp = 0
        self.gold = 0
    
    def status(self):
        return f"{self.name} Lv.{self.level} HP:{self.hp}/{self.max_hp}"
    
    def take_damage(self, dmg):
        actual = max(0, dmg - self.defense)
        self.hp -= actual
        return actual
    
    def is_alive(self):
        return self.hp > 0

# --- 敌人类 ---
class Enemy:
    def __init__(self, name, hp, atk):
        self.name = name
        self.hp = hp
        self.attack = atk
    
    def is_alive(self):
        return self.hp > 0

# --- 战斗函数 ---
def battle(player, enemy):
    print(f"⚔️ 战斗: {player.name} VS {enemy.name}")
    while player.is_alive() and enemy.is_alive():
        enemy.hp -= player.attack
        print(f"{player.name} 攻击！敌人HP: {max(0, enemy.hp)}")
        if not enemy.is_alive():
            print(f"🏆 胜利！")
            return True
        player.take_damage(enemy.attack)
        print(f"敌人反击！{player.name} HP: {player.hp}")
    return False

# --- 游戏开始 ---
print("="*40)
print("🏝️ 代码岛传奇 - 守护者试炼")
print("="*40)

hero = Player("旅行者")
print(f"\n欢迎，{hero.name}！")
print(f"状态: {hero.status()}")

# 战斗测试
slime = Enemy("史莱姆", 30, 8)
battle(hero, slime)

print(f"\n最终状态: {hero.status()}")
print("\n🎉 恭喜完成守护者试炼！")
print("你已经掌握了Python编程的精髓！")

lessons.example_solution:
class Player:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.level = 1
        self.hp = 100
        self.max_hp = 100
        self.attack = 15
        self.defense = 5
        self.exp = 0
        self.gold = 0
    def status(self):
        return f"{self.name} Lv.{self.level} HP:{self.hp}/{self.max_hp}"
    def take_damage(self, dmg):
        actual = max(0, dmg - self.defense)
        self.hp -= actual
        return actual
    def is_alive(self):
        return self.hp > 0
class Enemy:
    def __init__(self, name, hp, atk):
        self.name = name
        self.hp = hp
        self.attack = atk
    def is_alive(self):
        return self.hp > 0
def battle(player, enemy):
    print(f"⚔️ 战斗: {player.name} VS {enemy.name}")
    while player.is_alive() and enemy.is_alive():
        enemy.hp -= player.attack
        print(f"{player.name} 攻击！敌人HP: {max(0, enemy.hp)}")
        if not enemy.is_alive():
            print(f"🏆 胜利！")
            return True
        player.take_damage(enemy.attack)
        print(f"敌人反击！{player.name} HP: {player.hp}")
    return False
print("="*40)
print("🏝️ 代码岛传奇 - 守护者试炼")
print("="*40)
hero = Player("旅行者")
print(f"\n欢迎，{hero.name}！")
print(f"状态: {hero.status()}")
slime = Enemy("史莱姆", 30, 8)
battle(hero, slime)
print(f"\n最终状态: {hero.status()}")
print("\n🎉 恭喜完成守护者试炼！")
print("你已经掌握了Python编程的精髓！")
